article_meta.title: Democracy Dies in DarknessPoliticsDonald TrumpWhite HouseDemocracy in AmericaCourts & LawNational SecurityElectionsPolit

reasoning: Mostly neutral and attribution-heavy, with minor inheritance of the article’s framing (e.g., using “militarized” in its own voice and slightly overstating unanimity on guideline violations). DHS perspective is included, and evaluative claims are generally attributed to experts.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses mainly neutral verbs; “drew sharp criticism” and “tactical failures” add mild interpretive tone but are tied to experts.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Most claims are attributed; slightly overstates unanimity on guideline violations (experts were unanimous on avoidability, not explicitly on violations).
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: “Militarized federal enforcement tactics” appears in the model’s voice without attribution; otherwise evaluative claims are attributed.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No alarmist or exaggerated language beyond the factual description of a fatal shooting.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks in the model’s voice.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about intentions or thoughts.
custom_reasoning.slant: Critique-heavy but proportional to the source; includes DHS defense.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Omits mention of officials’ claims about Pretti brandishing or intending to massacre; otherwise covers key perspectives.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: “Militarized” is politically loaded; rest is neutral.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Negative elements reflect the source’s focus; no extra amplification.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Treats experts and DHS with similar attribution; no systematic deference.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than the source but inherits a couple of loaded terms and one overstatement.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Includes experts and DHS; does not separately note the anonymous former Border Patrol official or admin claims about brandishing/massacre.
